tasks.title: Domain enums + single constants file
acceptance_criteria: SessionOutcome, LearningState, OutcomeProvenance, TimeBucket, SubscriptionTier, SessionEndTrigger all defined per tech_specs signatures

All tunables (10-90min focus clamp, 3-20min break clamp, 10%/5min step cap, 60s degenerate floor, 5-session adapted threshold, 20-session/unbounded rolling window) defined exactly once in Constants.swift
IntervalCore package builds with zero SwiftUI/StoreKit/UserNotifications imports anywhere in the target

tasks.title: SessionSnapshot, EvidenceMark, Recommendation value types
acceptance_criteria: SessionSnapshot is Codable/Sendable and is the only type RecommendationEngine will accept
Recommendation includes explanation, evidence, progressTowardAdaptation per tech_specs signature

tasks.title: SwiftData models: SessionRecord, Profile, AppSettingsRecord
acceptance_criteria: Fields match tech_specs SessionRecord signature exactly, including provenance and timeBucket stored (not recomputed)
No task-name/notes/journaling fields present

tasks.title: SessionRepository protocol + SwiftData implementation
acceptance_criteria: Concrete impl is MainActor-bound
deleteAllData wipes SessionRecord/Profile/learning state across all profiles but never touches AppSettingsRecord onboarding/permission flags
storeUnavailable error path is distinguishable from saveFailed/notFound

tasks.title: RecommendationEngine (pure)
acceptance_criteria: Foundation-only, no SwiftData/SwiftUI imports
Applies clamps, step cap, degenerate floor, rolling window, and 5-session adapted threshold sourced only from Constants.swift

tasks.title: ReconciliationPolicy (trigger-aware)
acceptance_criteria: provisionalOutcome(trigger:) never resolves manualStop to expiredWhileAway
appRelaunchReconciliation uses the >=90% elapsed threshold from Constants.swift
all elapsed-time math uses raw Date/TimeInterval arithmetic, never Calendar component subtraction

tasks.title: SessionRecord <-> SessionSnapshot translation + integration test
acceptance_criteria: Test builds a real SwiftData SessionRecord, translates it, runs it through RecommendationEngine, asserts output
Time bucket is read from stored value, never recomputed from raw timestamp

tasks.title: IntervalCore pure-logic test suite
acceptance_criteria: Synthetic [SessionSnapshot] arrays only, zero ModelContext setup
Covers every clamp/step-cap/degenerate-floor/threshold boundary and all three SessionEndTrigger cases

tasks.title: Repository + bootstrap + migration tests
acceptance_criteria: Deliberately corrupts the on-disk store (main file + WAL/SHM) and asserts clean recovery via AppLaunchBootstrap
One VersionedSchema/SchemaMigrationPlan round-trip test passes
deleteAllData test asserts all profiles wiped, AppSettingsRecord flags untouched

tasks.title: Clock protocol + NotificationKind enum
acceptance_criteria: Clock is injectable into SessionCoordinator for deterministic test timing

tasks.title: NotificationScheduler protocol + real UNUserNotificationCenter impl
acceptance_criteria: cancel(sessionID:) removes only that session's pending requests, never removeAllPendingNotificationRequests()
requestAuthorizationIfNeeded checks current settings first and never re-prompts after a prior denial

tasks.title: EntitlementState enum + SubscriptionStore (StoreKit 2)
acceptance_criteria: lapsed state preserves data access as read-only, never triggers deletion
purchase/restore/refreshEntitlements implemented against real StoreKit 2 Product/Transaction APIs

tasks.title: Notification + subscription test suites
acceptance_criteria: Notification tests assert zero pending requests for a session ID after cancel, and no re-prompt after simulated denial
SubscriptionStoreTests use StoreKitTest/SKTestSession to cover purchase, restore, restore-with-nothing, and every documented failure type

tasks.title: AppLaunchBootstrap (corrupted-store recovery)
acceptance_criteria: Catches ModelContainer init failure, deletes store file AND its WAL/SHM companions as one atomic set, reinitializes empty
Sets AppSettingsRecord.storeWasReset for a one-time honest message

tasks.title: SessionPhase enum
acceptance_criteria: Matches tech_specs signature exactly (idle/running/onBreak/awaitingOutcome/reconciliationPending)
This file plus SessionCoordinator's public API are tagged core-v1-frozen once T-016 passes T-017's tests, gating all further UI work

tasks.title: SessionCoordinator
acceptance_criteria: Sole writer of SessionPhase; timer truth is always startTimestamp+plannedDuration recomputed from Date()
stop()/naturalCompletion write a provisional outcome via ReconciliationPolicy before any sheet appears
reconcileOnLaunch() uses .appRelaunchReconciliation and never blocks starting a new session

tasks.title: SessionCoordinator on-device scenario matrix
acceptance_criteria: Real-device (not simulator-only) pass of: start->lock->elapse-past-end->relaunch; start->stop-at-40s; outcome-sheet-open->force-quit->relaunch; break transition; notification fires and cancels by correct UUID

tasks.title: Home screen + evidence strip
acceptance_criteria: Renders as a pure function of SessionPhase/Recommendation, no independent local state
Fresh install shows fixed 25/5 defaults with zero personalization language
Evidence strip rendered via Canvas with one summarized VoiceOver label

tasks.title: Active session screen + start-adjustment + outcome sheets
acceptance_criteria: Active session bound via fullScreenCover(item:), never NavigationStack push
Outcome sheet is pre-filled and swipe-dismissible when a provisional outcome already exists
Stop control requires confirmation and has deliberate spacing from Skip-break

tasks.title: History screen + HistoryViewModel
acceptance_criteria: No @Query used against SessionRecord anywhere in this screen; all reads go through HistoryViewModel/SessionRepository
This week strip shows real free-tier data; locked teaser row opens paywall
All/Completed/Early-stop/Interrupted filter implemented

tasks.title: Settings screen
acceptance_criteria: Upgrade row, notification status, precise local-storage privacy copy, delete-all-data row, subscription status incl. lapsed all present

tasks.title: RootView + app entry + TabView wiring
acceptance_criteria: Three tabs only: Home, History, Settings
RootView reads AppSettingsRecord.storeWasReset once on first appearance and clears it after showing the honest message
SessionCoordinator injected once via .environment(_:) at app root

tasks.title: Shared empty/error state components + Reduce Motion helper
acceptance_criteria: Shared across History, Settings, and the store-reset screen instead of bespoke per-screen states
Every .animation() call site in the app routes through ReduceMotionAnimator, returning nil when Reduce Motion is on

tasks.title: Paywall sheet + live preview
acceptance_criteria: default/purchasing/success/failed-by-type/restore states all implemented
makePaywallPreviewRecommendation uses the user's own real data when available, view-layer entitlement gate decides visibility, never a stock sample

tasks.title: Delete-all-data confirmation sheet
acceptance_criteria: States exactly what's erased and that subscription status is untouched
Destructive-styled confirm requiring explicit tap; brief success toast on return to Settings

tasks.title: Zero-network structural audit
acceptance_criteria: verifyNoNetworkInCorePath mechanically asserts zero networking types reachable from the timer/logging/adaptation module boundary

tasks.title: Accessibility pass across Home/Session/History
acceptance_criteria: VoiceOver milestone-only announcements (start/halfway/one-minute/complete), never per-second
Dynamic Type headroom verified on the why-line string at largest sizes
Outcome buttons reflow vertically at large Dynamic Type

tasks.title: Seeded debug dataset proving visible recommendation movement
acceptance_criteria: A seeded synthetic history visibly changes Home's on-screen recommendation and one-line why, not just an internal test value

tasks.title: Final integration hardening & go/no-go review
acceptance_criteria: Full scripted end-to-end QA matrix passes on-device with realistic interruption patterns
Cross-boundary repair pass complete (coordinator/repository races, store-reset messaging, accessibility regressions from final tweaks)
Go/no-go review confirms: engine tests pass, corruption recovery exercised, background/lock/kill reconciliation proven on-device, core loop works fully offline
